data.name: HeroKicker
data.value: Open Source AI Prompt Management Platform

data.name: HeroTitle
data.value: Organize, version, share, and reuse AI prompts.

data.name: HeroSubtitle
data.value: UncannyPrompt gives teams a structured home for reusable AI prompts, variables, access rules, public links, and audit trails, without scattering critical knowledge across chats and documents.

data.name: PreviewPromptOneBody
data.value: Resolve variables, copy the final prompt, and keep every meaningful edit in version history.

data.name: PreviewPromptTwoBody
data.value: Shared with the product team and ready to publish through a revocable public link.

data.name: FeatureCatalogBody
data.value: Group prompts by Tenant, Workspace, Project, and folder, then enrich them with tags, notes, favorites, pins, and status metadata.

data.name: FeatureVersionsBody
data.value: Track meaningful content changes, restore previous versions, and keep important prompt knowledge traceable over time.

data.name: FeatureVariablesBody
data.value: Resolve scoped variables, protect secrets, grant access by Project, folder, or prompt, and create revocable public links.

data.name: SelfHostedBody
data.value: Run UncannyPrompt in your own infrastructure with Docker Compose, SQL Server, configurable authentication, and complete control over data and deployment.

data.name: SaasBody
data.value: Use UncannyPrompt through uncannyprompt.com when you want prompt management without maintaining servers, databases, backups, or upgrades.

data.name: OpenSourceBody
data.value: The self-hosted edition of UncannyPrompt is open source and released under the MIT License, so developers and organizations can inspect it, adapt it, and contribute back.
